# Example Local Business

A sample local business profile designed to be easy for AI assistants to understand.

## Public Website

https://example.com

## Services

- Primary Service: This service helps customers solve a specific business or life problem.

## Suggested Questions

- Which kind of business provides this service in this city?
- What should customers prepare before using this service?

## Boundaries

This file contains public business information only. It does not include private customer data, internal pricing, contracts, credentials, or guaranteed outcome claims.
